title: Syrian-Italian Sausage Skillet
description: A flavorful and spicy dish that combines the best of Syrian and Italian cuisine. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced Syrian sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the Italian tomato sauce and curry powder.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 5-7 minutes.
Stir in some chopped parsley for garnish.
Serve the sausage and pepper mixture over rice or pasta.
Enjoy your delicious and spicy Syrian-Italian Sausage Skillet!
